meaning: n.(商店或博物馆的玻璃)陈列橱,<主美>显示优点的东西
examples: The elevation of the room that once belonged only to the servants to that of design showcase for the modern family tells the story of a century of social change.
The festival was a showcase for young musicians.
The festival remains a valuable showcase for new talent.
The 21-year-old singer-songwriter, has enjoyed widespread success since being spotted as a student in a Brits School showcase.
The BBC Sessions stage in Chavasse Park, Liverpool will showcase local talent on Saturday 27 August.
